finance.title: Ethereum (ETH) news: Foundation unveils policy guide for governments and institutions
finance.blurb: The Ethereum Foundation said policymakers should distinguish between decentralized public blockchains and networks that remain controlled by corporations or foundations, arguing that governance structures will play a critical role in determining which platforms are suitable for long-term public sector use.
